title: How to File a Complaint — US DOL Wage and Hour Division
description: U.S. DOL Wage and Hour Division page on the confidential complaint process for federal wage-and-hour laws (FLSA, FMLA, and others): what to gather, how to contact WHD (1-866-487-9243 or online), and the four-stage investigation (employer conference, employee interviews, record review, final conference with back-wage resolution).

source.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor — Wage and Hour Division (WHD)

notes: Complaints are confidential by statute (identity, nature, and existence not disclosed to the employer). No filing deadline stated on the page; FLSA back-wage claims have a 2-year SOL (3 years if willful) under 29 U.S.C. §255; FMLA retaliation within 2 years (3 if willful).
